title: Sentinel Decision
description: The output of the 3-layer cascade for a single tool-call interception. Authoritative interface between daemon, hook, dashboard, and benchmark. Constitutional NON-NEGOTIABLE: every Decision MUST populate verdict, confidence, and reason.

verdict.description: Cascade decision. ALLOW = tool exists, pass through. AUTO_CORRECT = high-confidence replacement (>=0.85). SUGGEST = ambiguous, return candidates. BLOCK = no good candidate.

confidence.description: Final cascade confidence in [0, 1]. Constitution constraint: AUTO_CORRECT requires confidence >= 0.85.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation. Returned verbatim to the agent via stderr on BLOCK/AUTO_CORRECT/SUGGEST. Format as actionable retry instruction.

suggestion.description: Replacement tool when verdict is AUTO_CORRECT or SUGGEST. Null for ALLOW or BLOCK.

l3_ms.description: Layer 3 wall-clock ms (null when L3 did not fire)

degraded.description: True when a downstream call (L3 timeout, embedding 503) forced a fallback path.
